files.notes: This file contains four distinct lesson sections that were merged together: Theology (Lesson II), Genealogy (Lesson III), Home Ethics (Lesson IV), and Art (Lesson V). Each lesson has clear subject matter boundaries and question sections. The content after 'EDITORIAL NOTES' appears to be magazine administrative content that should remain with the Art lesson as it's the final lesson in the sequence.
